GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [sumsales@1 ASC, ss_customer_sk@0 ASC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[sumsales@1 ASC, ss_customer_sk@0 ASC], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_customer_sk@0 as ss_customer_sk, sum(t.act_sales)@1 as sumsales]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ss_customer_sk], aggr=[sum(t.act_sales)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_customer_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ss_customer_sk], aggr=[sum(t.act_sales)]
              GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_customer_sk@0 as ss_customer_sk, CASE WHEN sr_return_quantity@3 IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(ss_quantity@1 - sr_return_quantity@3 AS Decimal128(10, 0)) * ss_sales_price@2 ELSE CAST(ss_quantity@1 AS Decimal128(10, 0)) * ss_sales_price@2 END as act_sales]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(r_reason_sk@0, sr_reason_sk@3)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 5]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([r_reason_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=r_reason_desc@1 = reason 28, projection=[0]
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=26843545
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([sr_reason_sk@3], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_customer_sk@2 as ss_customer_sk, ss_quantity@3 as ss_quantity, ss_sales_price@4 as ss_sales_price, sr_reason_sk@0 as sr_reason_sk, sr_return_quantity@1 as sr_return_quantity]
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
                            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Right, on=[(sr_item_sk@0, ss_item_sk@0), (sr_ticket_number@2, ss_ticket_number@2)], projection=[1, 3, 5, 7, 8]
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([sr_item_sk@0, sr_ticket_number@2], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=26843545
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_item_sk@0, ss_ticket_number@2], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=26843545
--- memory ---
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
  GpuSortExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
          GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
            GpuAggregateExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
              GpuProjectExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=28, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
                  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=28, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                          GpuFilterExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                            GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36
                              GpuScanExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
                        GpuProjectExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
                            GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=16
                                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=16
                                  GpuScanExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=16
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=32
                                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=32
                                  GpuScanExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=32
